message:
feat(engine): add bun compat mode support for external .mjs index entrypoints with relative imports

Extends the module resolver's bun compatibility mode to correctly handle
external packages whose entrypoint is index.mjs (not just index.cjs/index.js).
Previously, relative import edges from an index.mjs entrypoint could escape
the package root during resolve_chain traversal.

Changes:
- Add .mjs extension coverage to external_package_root unit tests for both
  plain ("pkg/index.mjs") and scoped ("@scope/pkg/index.mjs") packages
- Add two unit tests in module_resolver verifying resolve_chain keeps
  relative imports from index.mjs inside the package root
- Add two integration tests (plain + scoped) confirming the full probe
  sequence, canonical specifier, and module syntax for bun_compat
  require() of external packages with .mjs entrypoints and relative deps

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
